encounter.reason: tissue diagnosis of mediastinal lymphadenopathy for suspected lung malignancy staging
encounter.service_provider: The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center

labs.name: cytopathology interpretation, station 4R lymph node
labs.specimen: right lower paratracheal lymph node (station 4R) needle aspirate

conditions.name: primary pulmonary adenocarcinoma
conditions.note: Confirmed by cytopathology and immunohistochemistry of EBUS-TBNA specimens. Immunophenotype (TTF-1+, CK7+, CK20−, p40−) consistent with primary pulmonary origin.

conditions.name: mediastinal lymph node metastasis
conditions.note: Adenocarcinoma confirmed in both station 4R and station 7 lymph nodes, establishing N2 disease.

conditions.name: suspected lung malignancy
conditions.note: Confirmed as adenocarcinoma by tissue diagnosis at this encounter.

procedures.name: endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration
procedures.body_site: mediastinal lymph nodes, stations 4R (right lower paratracheal) and 7 (subcarinal)
procedures.technique: flexible bronchoscope with integrated ultrasound transducer, oral approach, 22-gauge aspiration needle, real-time EBUS visualization
procedures.details: 3 passes at station 4R, 3 passes at station 7; rapid on-site cytology evaluation confirmed adequate tissue at both sites

document_references.description: Detailed procedure note for EBUS-TBNA of mediastinal lymph node stations 4R and 7, including indication, pre-procedure assessment, sedation, procedure technique with EBUS guidance, ROSE results, post-procedure course, chest X-ray findings, and disposition.

diagnostic_reports.description: Post-procedure portable chest X-ray obtained to evaluate for pneumothorax. No pneumothorax, no new pleural effusion, stable appearance of known right upper lobe mass.

diagnostic_reports.type: molecular/genomic testing panel on biopsy tissue
diagnostic_reports.description: Molecular testing ordered on EBUS-TBNA biopsy tissue for next-generation sequencing panel and PD-L1 expression testing. Results not yet available at time of this encounter.
